Start an OTLP/HTTP receiver and web UI server. Configure Claude Code with:
  export OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT=http://localhost:<otlp-port>

Usage:
  mindspec agentmind serve [flags]

Aliases:
  serve, live

Flags:
      --bind string     Address to bind to (use 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces) (default "127.0.0.1")
  -h, --help            help for serve
      --otlp-port int   Port for OTLP/HTTP receiver (default 4318)
      --output string   Write events to NDJSON file (append mode)
      --ui-port int     Port for web UI (default 8420)

Global Flags:
      --trace string   Write trace events to file (use - for stderr)
